headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Own for Decades and 2 We Find Risky
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

headline: Bactiguard Holding AB (OSTO:BACTI B) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Revenue ...
summary: Bactiguard Holding AB (OSTO:BACTI B) reports a mixed quarter with profitability in adjusted EBITDA despite a decline in revenue, focusing on strategic growth in key therapeutic areas.
